_metadata.description: Ingredient synergy clusters for bonus scoring when complementary ingredients are combined

synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Curcumin Absorption' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: curcumin >= 500, piperine >= 5, ginger >= 100. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: Influence of piperine on the pharmacokinetics of curcumin in animals and human volunteers

synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Magnesium Nervous System' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: magnesium >= 200, vitamin b6 >= 10, taurine >= 500. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: Magnesium and vitamin B6 in stressed healthy volunteers

synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Sleep Stack' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: melatonin >= 0.5, magnesium >= 100, l-theanine >= 100, gaba >= 100, apigenin >= 50, glycine >= 3000, .... See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: Melatonin, magnesium, and zinc supplementation for insomnia in long-term care residents

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: Vitamin D enhances calcium absorption; K2 directs calcium to bones (via osteocalcin) and away from arteries (via matrix Gla-protein). Prevents soft tissue calcification.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Vitamin D + K2 Calcium Synergy' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: vitamin d3 >= 1000, vitamin k2 >= 90, calcium >= 500, magnesium >= 200. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: Vitamin D - Health Professional Fact Sheet
Calcium - Health Professional Fact Sheet
FDA denies health claim notification for Vitamin K2 and osteoporosis

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: Phospholipid-bound omega-3s have 10x better absorption than ethyl esters. Astaxanthin protects omega-3s from oxidation. Take with fat for optimal absorption.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Omega-3 Absorption Enhancement' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: omega-3 >= 1000, phosphatidylcholine >= 500, astaxanthin >= 4. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Vitamin E Fact Sheet

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: Vitamin C is essential cofactor for prolyl and lysyl hydroxylase (collagen synthesis enzymes). Copper enables cross-linking via lysyl oxidase. Lysine/proline are primary collagen amino acids.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Collagen Synthesis Support' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: vitamin c >= 500, lysine >= 500, proline >= 500, copper >= 1. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Vitamin C Fact Sheet

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: NAC is mucolytic and boosts glutathione. Quercetin has antiviral properties enhanced by vitamin C (which recycles quercetin). Zinc supports immune function. Bromelain reduces inflammation.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Respiratory Health & Lung Support' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: nac >= 600, quercetin >= 500, vitamin c >= 500, zinc >= 15. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Vitamin C Fact Sheet

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: D-mannose binds to E. coli preventing adhesion. Cranberry proanthocyanidins (PACs) prevent bacterial adhesion. Vitamin C acidifies urine. Probiotics support healthy urogenital flora.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Urinary Tract Health' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: d-mannose >= 2000, cranberry extract >= 500, vitamin c >= 500. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Vitamin C Fact Sheet

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: Saw palmetto inhibits 5-alpha reductase. Beta-sitosterol supports urinary flow. Zinc is highly concentrated in prostate tissue. Lycopene is a prostate-specific antioxidant.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Prostate Health' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 2 (moderate). Anchor dose checks: saw palmetto >= 320, beta-sitosterol >= 60, zinc >= 15, lycopene >= 10. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Zinc Fact Sheet

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: DHA is critical for brain cell membranes. Phosphatidylserine supports neurotransmitter function. Zinc and iron deficiencies are linked to attention issues. L-theanine + caffeine enhance focus synergistically.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Focus & Attention Support' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: dha >= 500, phosphatidylserine >= 100, zinc >= 15, iron >= 10. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Magnesium Fact Sheet

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: Black cohosh and red clover provide phytoestrogens for hot flash relief. Evening primrose supports hormonal balance. Sage specifically targets hot flashes and night sweats. Maca supports overall hormonal adaptation.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Menopause & Perimenopause Support' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 2 (moderate). Anchor dose checks: black cohosh >= 40, red clover >= 40, maca >= 2000, evening primrose oil >= 500. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Vitamin B6 Fact Sheet

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: Folate prevents neural tube defects. Iron supports increased blood volume. DHA is critical for fetal brain/eye development. Choline supports neural development. Iodine supports thyroid and fetal brain development.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Prenatal & Pregnancy Support' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: folate >= 600, iron >= 27, dha >= 200, choline >= 450, iodine >= 150. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Vitamin B12 Fact Sheet

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: B vitamins (especially B1, B6, B12) are essential for nerve function. Alpha-lipoic acid is proven for diabetic neuropathy. Acetyl-L-carnitine supports nerve regeneration. Benfotiamine has superior bioavailability for nerve tissue.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Nerve Health & Neuropathy Support' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 1 (strong). Anchor dose checks: benfotiamine >= 150, alpha-lipoic acid >= 300, vitamin b12 >= 1000, acetyl-l-carnitine >= 500. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Vitamin B6 Fact Sheet

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: Quercetin stabilizes mast cells and inhibits histamine release. Vitamin C is a natural antihistamine and enhances quercetin. Bromelain improves quercetin absorption. DAO enzyme breaks down dietary histamine.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Histamine & Allergy Support' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 2 (moderate). Anchor dose checks: quercetin >= 500, vitamin c >= 1000, bromelain >= 500, stinging nettle >= 300. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Vitamin C Fact Sheet

synergy_clusters.synergy_mechanism: Astragalus and cordyceps have nephroprotective properties. Omega-3s reduce inflammation. CoQ10 supports mitochondrial function in kidney cells. Alpha-lipoic acid provides antioxidant protection.
synergy_clusters.note: +1 synergy bonus applies when at least 2 ingredients from 'Kidney Health Support' are matched and at least half of dose-checkable ingredients meet minimum effective doses. Evidence strength: Tier 2 (moderate). Anchor dose checks: astragalus >= 500, omega-3 >= 1000, coq10 >= 100, vitamin d >= 1000. See sources for supporting references.

sources.label: NIH ODS Vitamin D Fact Sheet
